prestazioni: Engine: Type 911/72 (2.8L flat-six, air-cooled, 90mm bore x 70.4mm stroke, magnesium crankcase) with a custom-built 10.3:1 compression ratio using Mahle forged pistons (P/N 911.100.101.20) and titanium connecting rods (Porsche Motorsport P/N 911.105.201.01) for 300+ HP at 8,000 RPM on 100-octane race fuel.

Forced Induction: Single KKK K27 turbocharger (P/N 5323-970-3200S) with a custom 0.60 A/R turbine housing, paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler (Porsche Motorsport P/N 911.606.101.00) and a Pierburg 400 LPH fuel pump (P/N 7.21440.51.0) for sustained boost levels of 1.2 bar (17.4 PSI).

Suspension & Handling: Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (P/N B16-PSS10-01) with custom valving for the RSR’s 2,271mm wheelbase, paired with a 930 Turbo front sway bar (24mm, adjustable) and a 917-derived rear sway bar (22mm, solid). Chassis reinforcement via a TIG-welded 911 ST-style roll cage (Porsche Motorsport P/N 911.501.001.00) with integrated strut tower braces (P/N 911.343.901.00).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full 917-inspired RSR replica body kit (Elephant Racing P/N ER-911RSR-2.8) with a 1,800mm-wide fiberglass rear wing (P/N 911.071.201.00), front splitter with integrated brake ducts (P/N 911.071.101.00), and side skirts with NACA ducts for oil cooler airflow (P/N 911.071.301.00).

Wheels & Tires: BBS E50 magnesium wheels (15x9 front, 15x12 rear, P/N 911.361.021.00/911.361.022.00) with center-lock hubs, wrapped in Pirelli P7 Corsa tires (235/600-15 front, 285/600-15 rear) for period-correct grip levels.

Interior & Livery: Full FIA-spec roll cage (Porsche Motorsport P/N 911.501.001.00) with Recaro SRD racing seats (P/N 911.641.011.00) and Schroth 6-point harnesses (P/N ASM-6-27). Exterior livery in Gulf Oil’s iconic powder blue (Porsche P/N 999.040.000.03) with white roundels and Martini Racing stripes (applied via 3M 1080 vinyl, P/N 3M-1080-G12).
